title: Periodic Trends Explorer
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Interactive periodic table that visualizes multiple trends (radius, ionization energy, etc.) with color transitions.

learningObjectives: Analyze periodic properties across groups and periods
Evaluate exceptions using effective nuclear charge and shielding

keyQuestions: Why do atomic radii decrease across a period?
How does Zeff explain trends in ionization energy?
commonMisconceptions: Electronegativity and electron affinity are identical
Atomic radius increases across a period
assessmentOpportunities: Ask students to justify an element’s property value using the trend arrows
